GULP / FIG.01
INTERNAL NORTH-STAR · v1
2026.06.18
PRODUCT ONE-PAGERDIGEST · ABSORB · MASTER
Gulp.
a personal learning system
for the age of information overload
Save anything and you still forget it. Gulp digests what you consume into knowledge you can recall, test, and reuse.
Forward anything. Gulp turns it into knowledge you can actually remember.
00WHY THIS MATTERS
“
The smarter AI gets, the more it does for us — and the less we do for ourselves.
Gulp makes the opposite bet: AI’s highest use is to make the person using it stronger. Same powerful models — pointed at your growth, not just your output. You stay the one who understands.
01THE CORE LOOP
INTAKE
a universal inbox for anything you consume
→
DIGEST
AI turns each input into a knowledge pack, not a summary
→
MASTERY
cards, tested & scheduled until you own it
FORWARD ANYTHING→KNOWLEDGE PACK→5 MIN IN GULP MODE→MASTERY TRACKED
02WHY WE WIN
vsRECALLsource management, a daily knowledge stream, a real mastery model
vsREADWISEtestable knowledge, not just resurfaced highlights
vsNOTEBOOKLMa long-term, cross-topic system with real spaced repetition
vsREMNOTEstarts from your real stream, not manual notes
vsCUBOXactive mastery after reading, not just retrieval
vsOBSIDIAN / NOTION / TANAthe system builds itself — no setup, no upkeep
03MVP — THE SHARP LOOP
01
Universal inbox
links · PDF · video · podcast · audio · screenshots — WeChat, extension, share sheet, email-in
02
AI knowledge pack
summary, background, terms, claims, counter-views, links to prior knowledge
03
Card-based KB
Source · Claim · Concept · Question · Card · Conversation · Insight
04
Gulp mode
daily 5–10 min: new + due reviews, retests, MCQ, explain-it, apply-it
05
Conversation capture
chat any card; on exit, extract new points & corrected misconceptions
06
Mastery + scheduling
right / wrong / fuzzy → interval; FSRS later
NOT, IN v1:  a general PKM · a read-later reader · a team tool · a content platform · notes-first.
04PRINCIPLES
01Digestion, not collection
02Mastery is the unit, not the bookmark
03Forward anything — capture must be effortless
04The system builds itself
05Conversations are assets
SUCCESS
Users return to Gulp mode unforced and get measurably sharper week over week — cards graduated, retention climbing. If people learn from Gulp instead of just stashing in it, we win.
